properties.description: Identifier for learning objects in the Activity_csod table
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of the learning activities
properties.business_description: A unique identifier for each learning activity, used to track and manage learning performance within the Cornerstone system.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format to ensure it meets VARCHAR standards
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activityType, Filter by isActive status

properties.description: Name of the activity associated with learning or compliance.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the activity being described
properties.business_description: This column represents the name of the learning activity or compliance task that employees are required to complete.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure the name is descriptive and relevant to the activity, Check for consistency in naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activityType, Filter by isActive status
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of activities by name, GROUP BY activityName for reporting

properties.description: A code representing a specific activity within the Cornerstone Learn system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should follow a predefined format if applicable
properties.business_description: This column identifies the type of activity that learners can engage in, such as training sessions, compliance courses, or certifications.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid activity codes against the defined list, Ensure no leading or trailing spaces
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activityType, Filter by isActive status

properties.description: Indicates whether the activity is related to compliance requirements.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, indicating that compliance status is not applicable for some activities. If true, the activity must be completed by learners to maintain compliance.
properties.business_description: This column specifies if an activity is a compliance-related task that learners must complete to meet regulatory or organizational standards.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are either true or false. Check for null values where compliance is expected.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by compliance status (true/false), Filter by activity type to see compliance-related activities
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of compliance activities, Percentage of completed compliance activities

properties.description: Type of activity associated with learning events in the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Must be a valid activity type defined in the system
properties.business_description: This column categorizes the type of learning activity, such as training, compliance, or certification, which is essential for understanding employee learning performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against predefined list of activity types, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific activity types, Filter by compliance status
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by activityType, SUM of estimatedDuration by activityType

properties.description: Estimated duration of the activity in hours or minutes.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the duration is not specified, Should be a positive numeric value if provided
properties.business_description: This column represents the expected time required for a learner to complete the activity, which is crucial for planning and scheduling training sessions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that the value is numeric if not null, Check for excessively high or low values that may indicate data entry errors
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activity type, Filter by compliance status

properties.description: Indicates whether the activity is a certification program.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Values should be either 'Yes' or 'No' to indicate certification status
properties.business_description: This column identifies if a specific learning activity is classified as a certification, which is crucial for compliance tracking and employee development.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid values ('Yes', 'No'), Ensure no unexpected values are present
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by certification status, Filter by activity type
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of certification activities, SUM of estimated durations for certification activities

properties.description: Indicates whether the activity is currently active or not.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Values must be 'true' or 'false'
properties.business_description: This column represents the active status of an activity in the Cornerstone Learn system, determining if the activity is available for learners.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid boolean values, Ensure no unexpected values are present
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by active status, Filter by compliance activities

properties.description: Column representing the individual or entity responsible for the activity.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the responsible party for the activity
properties.business_description: The owner of the activity, which could be a person or department responsible for managing or overseeing the activity.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure that the owner is a valid reference to an existing entity, Check for consistency in naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by owner to analyze activities managed by specific individuals or departments

properties.description: Represents the cost associated with an activity in the Cornerstone Learn platform.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the activity is free, Should be a valid numeric value if provided
properties.business_description: The cost incurred for participating in a specific learning activity, which may include training sessions, certifications, or compliance activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure the value is a valid numeric format, Check for consistency in currency representation
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activity type, Filter by compliance status

properties.description: Column representing the currency type used for cost-related activities.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no cost is associated with the activity, Should conform to standard currency codes (e.g., USD, EUR)
properties.business_description: This column indicates the currency in which the costs of activities are denominated, allowing for financial analysis and reporting.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against a list of standard currency codes, Check for null values where cost is present
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific currency types, Filter by activities with associated costs

properties.description: Column representing the subject of the activity in the CSOD system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the subject of the activity
properties.business_description: The subject area or topic that the activity covers, which is essential for categorizing and filtering learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure subject is descriptive and relevant to the activity, Check for consistency in subject naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by subject to analyze specific learning topics, Use in conjunction with activityType for detailed reporting

properties.description: The entity or organization that offers the activity or course.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the activity is internal, Should be populated for external activities
properties.business_description: This column represents the provider of the learning activity, which can be an internal department or an external vendor.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid provider names, Ensure consistency in naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by provider to analyze specific activities, Filter by compliance status to see provider effectiveness
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by provider, GROUP BY provider for reporting

properties.description: Name of the instructor responsible for the activity.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no instructor is assigned, Should be a valid name format
properties.business_description: The instructor who leads or facilitates the learning activity, providing guidance and support to learners.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for empty values, Validate name format
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by instructor name, Filter by activity type

properties.description: Column representing the facility where the activity takes place.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the facility name
properties.business_description: This column indicates the specific facility associated with a learning activity, which is important for tracking and reporting on employee learning performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against a list of known facilities, Check for spelling errors
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific facility, Filter by activity type
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by facility, GROUP BY facility

properties.description: A code representing a specific event in the Activity table.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should follow a predefined format if applicable
properties.business_description: This column identifies the type of event associated with an activity, which can be used to categorize and analyze learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid event codes against a predefined list, Ensure no leading or trailing spaces
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by eventCode to analyze specific events, Filter by isActive to see only current events
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by eventCode, GROUP BY eventCode

properties.description: The date when the activity is scheduled to start, represented as a string in timestamp format without time zone.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the activity has not been scheduled, Should follow the format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' if populated
properties.business_description: This column indicates the start date of an activity within the Cornerstone Learn platform, which is essential for tracking and reporting on employee learning performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate format to ensure it matches the expected timestamp format, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific date ranges, Filter by activity type to analyze compliance activities
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of activities starting on a specific date, GROUP BY activityStartDate for trend analysis

properties.description: The date when the activity concludes, represented as a timestamp without time zone.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the activity is ongoing, Should be populated for completed activities
properties.business_description: This column indicates the end date of an activity, which is crucial for tracking compliance and performance in learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure the date format is valid, Check for logical consistency with activityStartDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific activity types, Filter by compliance status
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of activities ending within a specific period, SUM of estimated durations for activities ending in a given timeframe

properties.description: This table contains detailed information about various learning activities within the Cornerstone OnDemand (CSOD) platform, including compliance, certification, and logistical details.
properties.business_purpose: The Activity_csod table serves as a foundational data source for generating insights and analytics related to employee learning performance, enabling organizations to track compliance, manage training costs, and optimize learning resources.
properties.data_lineage: Data is sourced from the Cornerstone OnDemand platform, populated through automated ETL processes that extract, transform, and load learning activity data.
properties.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 5 years to comply with regulatory and organizational policies.
